title: Keep Your Mind in Hell: The Monk Who Survived Despair

source_mix_target.generated_atmospheric_cards: 0% unless no verified saint image exists

usage_rules: Use only verified picture/icon/painting of the saint.
If multiple saint images are available, sequence them one after another.
Do not use monastery photos, manuscript/source images, maps, landscapes, or generic b-roll in Saints videos.
Keep saint image framing zoomed out enough to avoid cutting the face/body/icon unnaturally.
Preferred design remains text-left / saint-image-right where text is used.

scenes.title: Despair Without Surrender

beats.narration_excerpt: The famous phrase is severe because it refuses two lies at once.  The first lie says: I am fine.  I do not need repentance.
